title: Photogrammetry Structure-from-Motion
source_data_quality_note: Source MD is a widefield-fluorescence fan-out artifact; principle grounded in domain literature.

E.description: Photogrammetry Structure-from-Motion: SfM photogrammetry: recover 3D scene structure and camera poses from unordered image set via bundle adjustment. The forward operator produces the measurement through a 3-node primitive DAG (S.sfm.feature_matching…); recovery is posed as a nonlinear_inverse problem. Difficulty tier delta=3 with effective condition number kappa_eff~200; GPS_geotag_accuracy_m, feature_matching_outlier_rate set the accuracy floor at the Omega boundary. See the forward_model field for the closed-form equation.
E.forward_model: x_ij = P_i * X_j / lambda_ij; P_i = K * [R_i | t_i]; minimize sum ||x_ij - x_ij ** obs||^2
E.world_state_x: 3D point positions X_j and camera pose parameters (R_i, t_i, K_i)
E.observation_y: 2D keypoint observations x_ij for N_images images, M_points 3D points

W.regime: Existence of the recovered 3D_point_cloud_camera_poses is guaranteed within the declared Omega bounds. Uniqueness holds on the measurement-supported subspace; out-of-support modes are controlled by declared priors. Stability is conditionally stable (kappa_eff ~= 200); GPS_geotag_accuracy_m dominates the stability cliff; the remaining mismatch parameters contribute higher-order bias terms. Gaussian sets the irreducible data-fidelity floor.

C.error_bound: Data-fidelity bound: GCP RMSE < 5 cm UAV, < 1 cm aerial with GCPs. Noise floor: O(sigma / sqrt(kappa_eff)) with kappa_eff~200. Mismatch-induced bias + C2 * |GPS_geotag_accuracy_m|; iterative solvers achieve q=2 convergence (O(1/k^2)) near the optimum; epsilon_fn captures quality degradation across declared Omega.
C.complexity: O(N_images * N_points * N_iter) for sparse bundle adjustment per iteration
